nasb.text: “How long, O naive ones, will you love being simple-minded? And scoffers delight themselves in scoffing And fools hate knowledge?

esv.text: “How long, O simple ones, will you love being simple? How long will scoffers delight in their scoffing and fools hate knowledge?

cnv.text: “你們愚蒙人喜愛愚蒙， 好譏笑的人喜歡譏笑， 愚昧人恨惡知識，要到幾時呢？

ccb.text: “你们愚昧人喜爱愚昧， 嘲讽者以嘲弄为乐， 无知者厌恶知识， 要到什么时候呢？

csbs.text: “无知的人喜爱无知， 讥讽者贪爱讥讽， 愚昧人恨恶知识， 要到什么时候呢？
